work_unit: dev-server.js ONEDAY_DIR env validation (audit-2026-07-06-026 M-001 derived fix)
situation: Deep audit audit-2026-07-06-026 found M-001: dev-server.js line 20 trusts process.env.ONEDAY_DIR verbatim. Path traversal defense prevents escaping dir, but if ONEDAY_DIR itself points to /etc or ~/.ssh (e.g., PaaS inherits stale/malicious env from prior job), every file under that root becomes readable via GET. H-001 fix already merged into opt-dev-server-1783353888 (commit 7001a07); cp-guard triggered when attempting fresh opt-worktree commit on same file → followed escape hatch (case-104 pattern) and edited worktree directly.
action: Added startup-time ONEDAY_DIR validation in dev-server.js: when env is set, resolve to absolute + verify isDirectory(); fail fast with clear error message if non-absolute, inaccessible, or not a directory. Default path (__dirname) unchanged — only constrains explicit env injection. Committed as stacked commit on existing opt-dev-server-1783353888 branch (post-H-001-fix).
outcome_evidence: Commit 1edb694 on auto/opt-dev-server-1783353888 pushed to origin (7001a07..1edb694). Diff: +24/-1 lines adding _rawOnedayDir capture + path.isAbsolute() + fs.statSync().isDirectory() checks with descriptive console.error + process.exit(1) on each failure mode. Code review URL: https://code.alibaba-inc.com/OneDayAI-RPUKYRO/1BfrYW9R/codereview/new?from=master&to=auto/opt-dev-server-1783353888
next_suggestion: 派生下一个 pending fix: M-002 (/api/* namespace collision — add explicit catch-all returning 404 for unregistered /api/xxx routes)
